pages.title: Witch Hunters
pages.text: Since the dawn of witchcraft, there has always been a group interested in the annihilation of those who practiced it. Witch Hunters are creatures specialized in hunting witches, and can perceive when certain types of magic are used.$(br)

pages.title: Finding Witch Hunters
pages.text: When performing black magic, such as $(l:circle_magic/curses/blindness)Curses$(/l), or using $(l:artifacts/poppets/poppets#vampiric)Vampiric$(/l) and $(l:artifacts/poppets/poppets#voodoo)Voodoo$(/l) Poppets, chances are that they will find you instead. They will usually come wielding $(l:artifacts/weapons/crossbow_pistol)Crossbow Pistol$(/l) and wearing $(l:artifacts/clothing/witch_hunter_clothing)Witch Hunter Armor$(/l)
